title: Marked by False Gods
description:
Edward Lee got fired this morning for falling asleep at his desk.

He was still lying on his bed thinking about rent when a ball of light the size of a tennis ball floated into his room and told him he had been selected as a constellation manager.

"Selected by who?"

[Permission too low for the question to be answered.]

Now he stands in a place where nothing has ever existed, with borrowed Life Energy he doesn't understand and a support line he cannot afford to call even once.

[Note: The system wished him a pleasant day. Edward found this unhelpful.]
